title: Shri Gange Mata Ki Aarti
intro: Read Shri Gange Mata Ki Aarti in Hindi and seek the divine blessings of Goddess Ganga.
description:
Om Jai Gange Mata,
Shri Jai Gange Mata.
Jo nar tumko dhyata,
Manvanchit phal paata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Chandra si jot tumhari,
Jal nirmal aata.
Sharan pade jo teri,
So nar tar jaata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Putra Sagar ke tare,
Sab jag ko gyata.
Kripa drishti tumhari,
Tribhuvan sukh daata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Ek hi baar jo teri,
Sharanagati aata.
Yam ki traas mita kar,
Paramgati paata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥

Aarti maat tumhari,
Jo jan nitya gaata.
Daas vahi sahaj mein,
Mukti ko paata॥
॥ Om Jai Gange Mata ॥
